items.title: Reading
items.description: I really enjoy reading, especially reading someone's inspiring experience, reading documentation and theory of music and drawing, I also like reading several books about science, astrology and biology

items.title: Writing
items.description: I really enjoy writing, I think writing is an effective way to express emotions, ideas and thoughts in my brain spontaneously in the initial stages and one day the writing can be read again as a memory.

items.title: Drawing
items.description: I also like to draw. Apart from being a typical person who pays attention to aesthetics, I also really like to pay attention to art, drawing can also make my imagination more creative and inovative

items.title: Playing Guitar
items.description: I spend almost all my free time playing guitar, studying notes, octaves, harmony, alternate-picking techniques, sweep-picking, and memorizing patterns through the pentatonic scale
